label: Gravship component type
description: Defines a category of gravship component, controlling whether the gravship requires at least one of this type installed to launch.

requiredForLaunch.label: Required for launch
requiredForLaunch.description: Whether the gravship requires at least one building of this component type to be installed before it can launch. Defaults to true.

new-gravship-component-type.label: New gravship component type
new-gravship-component-type.description: Minimal gravship component type with a label.
